items.summary: Reworked conditional freeze semantics so frozen_with_conditions requires no active reject verdict, records arbitration evidence plus invoker_acceptance_required, and blocks canonical promotion until explicit invoker acceptance.

Separated durable package identity from run-scoped and invocation-bound outputs by moving canonical artifacts to tools/agent-role-builder/role/, isolating runtime targets in their own subsection, and treating bundled governance and authority docs as runtime-resolved inputs rather than durable run-path identity.
Changed cross-round carry-forward semantics from conceptual-group tracking to stable finding IDs across context gathering, fix-items handling, resume-package requirements, and closeout.
Downgraded the self-check from claimed semantic validation to explicit lexical heuristic coverage with recorded keywords and matching evidence, while reserving semantic adequacy for review.
